title: rubus × aulninus
intro: Rubus × aulninus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or thimbleberry, is a cross between the European black raspberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus), producing a unique and flavorful fruit. The medicinal properties of Rubus × aulninus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × aulninus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × aulninus often take the form of teas, jams, and dried fruits, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and nutritional properties.
